name: DPO Group
description: DPO Group — Pan-African payment service provider covering 21 African markets with cards, mobile money, and e-wallets.

seo.title: DPO Group — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: DPO Group: DPO Group — Pan-African payment service provider covering 21 African markets with cards, mobile money, and e-wallets.

when_to_use: Card, mobile money, and e-wallet acceptance across 21 African markets
Pan-African payment gateway for travel, hospitality, and e-commerce
Cross-border settlement for platforms collecting from multiple African countries
M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, and Airtel Money integration via single DPO API

review.verdict: Broad African reach but legacy feel — works if breadth matters more than developer polish.
review.best_for: Merchants needing broad pan-African acceptance across fragmented rails
review.not_for: Teams prioritizing clean APIs and self-serve integration

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down
